business_ideas.idea: Mad Realities: short-form TikTok shows (Buying Time watches, Keep Meter Running, Einstein Elementary).
Click Funnels competitor: better designed funnel builder specifically for e-commerce with clear upsells.
Pain-free fitness program (not ripped/jacked): mobility and strength for eliminating joint pain.
Gentle.com: search engine aggregating vintage goods across Poshmark, Depop, Real Real.

predictions.text: TikTok shows are doors opportunity, value will emerge though not yet clear like early YouTube.
Next generation media companies will be 1000x more experiments on TikTok than TV.
Raise too much money early kills potential, like BuzzFeed and Bird scooter cap table issues.
